title: claytonia caroliniana
intro: Claytonia caroliniana, also known as Carolina spring beauty, is a perennial wildflower native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Claytonia caroliniana include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent such as ethanol.
